name: Old Fashioned No-Fat Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking soda and spices.
2. In a mixer bowl, combine egg, egg whites, vanilla, applesauce and buttermilk. Mix with an electric mixer until well combined.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, blending well.
4. Stir in the diced apples and raisins by hand.
5. Pour the batter into an 8x8 pan that has been sprayed with Pam.
6. Sprinkle the brown sugar evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 50 minutes.
8. This recipe freezes well.
